variants: Thais Delong is currently employed at Golden Barrel Textiles, where she utilizes her extensive knowledge of the industry. Hailing from Mossgate Stead, she has made a home for herself in Diamond Hummock. Among her many contributions, Thais authored the Kindle Core Analyzer, a crucial tool that has advanced textile technology. Her hard work and dedication have been recognized, culminating in the receipt of the Crystal Feather Distinction for her outstanding achievements in the field.
